mentor_001.name: Sarah Chen
mentor_001.description: I am an experienced AI Architect with a 15-year background in Natural Language Processing and machine learning. I have successfully scaled systems from PoC to enterprise level and helped a startup reach acquisition by a major tech firm. I excel at system architecture design and data strategy.

mentor_002.name: Kenji Tanaka
mentor_002.description: A former financial regulator specializing in compliance strategy for disruptive technology. I provide guidance for companies developing blockchain solutions, payment processors, and global financial software that require strict regulatory alignment and scaling plans.

mentor_003.name: Fatima Al-Fassi
mentor_003.description: User-experience designer focused on inclusive and accessible mobile solutions for diverse global audiences. I excel at simplifying complex workflows and building intuitive user interfaces, especially for applications targeting users on lower-bandwidth networks.

mentor_004.name: David Osei
mentor_004.description: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) with deep expertise in building secure infrastructures for cloud-native applications. I help startups design zero-trust architectures and prepare for rigorous security audits like SOC 2 and ISO 27001.

mentor_005.name: Elena Rostova
mentor_005.description: Former VP of Product at a leading SaaS company. I specialize in helping early-stage founders refine their product vision, establish agile development cycles, and define effective Go-To-Market (GTM) strategies for B2B enterprise software.

mentor_006.name: Marcus Vance
mentor_006.description: Hardware engineer and supply chain expert. I guide startups through the transition from hardware prototyping to mass manufacturing, specializing in IoT device architecture, embedded firmware, and sourcing reliable suppliers.

mentor_007.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
mentor_007.description: Physician turned software entrepreneur. I assist startups operating in the heavily regulated healthcare space, offering strategic advice on HIPAA compliance, electronic health record (EHR) integrations, and bioinformatics platforms.

mentor_008.name: Wei Zheng
mentor_008.description: Supply chain technologist who built fulfillment networks for top e-commerce brands. I mentor companies creating logistics software, warehouse management systems, and D2C retail platforms looking to optimize operations.

mentor_009.name: Chloe Dubois
mentor_009.description: Pioneer in mixed reality environments and spatial computing. I advise teams building immersive experiences for education, enterprise training, and gaming using Unity and Unreal Engine.

mentor_010.name: Jamal Tariq
mentor_010.description: Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) veteran. I help fast-growing startups stabilize their infrastructure, set up robust CI/CD pipelines, and transition to Kubernetes to handle massive traffic spikes gracefully.

partner_003.name: Sofia Ramirez
partner_003.description: Cross-platform mobile developer with 4 years of experience building consumer-facing apps using Flutter and Dart. I am looking to join a founding team to lead front-end mobile development.

partner_004.name: Liam O'Connor
partner_004.description: Blockchain developer passionate about decentralized finance (DeFi). Experienced in writing secure Solidity smart contracts and integrating Web3 interfaces. Seeking a startup innovating in the crypto space.

partner_005.name: Ananya Patel
partner_005.description: Robotics enthusiast and computer vision engineer. I specialize in real-time object detection and image segmentation. Looking for a hardware or autonomous vehicle startup to partner with.

partner_006.name: James Wilson
partner_006.description: Cloud architect who loves automating infrastructure. Proficient in AWS, serverless architectures, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform). I want to help a bootstrapped startup build a scalable backend from day one.

partner_007.name: Yuki Nakamura
partner_007.description: Design-obsessed frontend engineer. I turn complex Figma files into pixel-perfect, highly responsive web applications using Vue.js and Tailwind. Looking to partner with a strong backend engineer.

partner_008.name: Anders Berg
partner_008.description: High-performance backend developer focusing on Go and Rust. I love building highly concurrent microservices and optimizing latency. Looking for a highly technical product that needs serious backend horsepower.
